name: ruflo-core
description: Foundation plugin for Codex: registers the ruflo MCP server (300+ tools across memory/agentdb/embeddings/hooks/aidefence/neural/autopilot/browser/agent/swarm), provides 3 generalist agents (coder/researcher/reviewer), 3 first-run skills, and a curated plugin-discovery catalog

interface.shortDescription: Ruflo MCP, memory, hooks, and discovery
interface.longDescription: Foundation plugin for Codex that bundles the Ruflo/Claude Flow MCP server configuration, Codex-compatible hooks, curated core skills, and generalist agent guidance. Ruflo coordinates and records state; Codex still executes code and commands.
defaultPrompt: Use Ruflo memory and hooks to coordinate this Codex task
